name: Five Soup Hot Dish
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Cream Of Celery Soup, undiluted
1 Can Cream Of Mushroom Soup, undiluted
1 Can Cream Of Chicken Soup, undiluted
1 Can Beef With Barley Soup, undiluted
1 Can Chicken And Rice Soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and onions.
2. Add the soups to the pan and mix well.
3. Fold in two-thirds of the noodles.
4. Place the mixture in a large casserole dish.
5. Top with the remaining noodles.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
Serves 6 to 8
